steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create worktree and task branch, record branch info, plan step list.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0004_generate_target_tuning_curve is completed and its target-tuning-curve dataset is usable.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create canonical task folder tree (code, data, results, research, plan, assets, intervention, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: scoring function is a pure-math library; canonical DSI/HWHM formulas are already codified in t0004.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Review conventions used in public DSGC / direction-selectivity scoring code for DSI definitions, peak-at-preferred, null residual, and HWHM computation edge cases.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Inspect t0004 target-curve generator to match DSI and HWHM formulas exactly, so score(target, target) == 0.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan module layout, API surface, weight defaults, CLI, test matrix, and registered metric mapping.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: pure local Python+NumPy library; no remote compute.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Write the tuning-curve-loss library, tests, and CLI. Register the library asset and run pytest.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: scoring library is a mechanical implementation with a fixed spec; no exploratory variation.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: not an experimental task; no published comparable result to compare against.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json (test counts), costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for scoring/weights/envelope exploration.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Finalize task.json, capture session logs, run verificators, open PR, merge, refresh overview.
